category_sources: source_facts.description calls it a database client; dblab.app describes a terminal-based UI application for databases.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is dblab; dblab.app uses dblab as the project title.
docs_sources: dblab.app is the official documentation site and links to the source code.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/danvergara/dblab; per instructions repo was not rechecked.
tags_sources: dblab.app describes a cross-platform terminal-based UI for databases and lists PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite3, Oracle, and SQL Server support; current_curation.tags includes cli.
